institution.name: Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Aguadilla
institution.address: Carr. 459 Int. 463, Barrio Corrales Sector Calero

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 27% at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Aguadilla vs the 2003–2007 baseline (3.0k vs 4.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Aguadilla fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Aguadilla rose 28% between 2021 and 2024 (33.4% → 42.9%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Aguadilla rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (68.1% → 80.6%).
